Co-parenting communication, on the record

Your messages are evidence.
Treat them that way.

Liaison.legal gives you a secure, timestamped record of every co-parenting message — automatically hashed, permanently logged, and ready for your attorney and the court. Free for parents, forever.

Start Free Account → See how it works
✓ Free forever for parents ✓ No credit card 🔒 Encrypted & tamper-evident
JM

Case #2024-1847

Jordan Mercer

VERIFIED

I need to pick up Emma at 5pm. The order says 4pm.

✓ Read 9:14 AM

The court order clearly states 4:00 PM at the school entrance.

Sent 9:16 AM

I won't be able to make it by 4. Traffic.

✓ Read 9:17 AM

This message is being recorded per our court order.

Sent 9:18 AM

✓

SHA-256: a3f9e2c1… · Tamper-evident ledger

Liaison.legal is a free co-parenting communication app for separated and divorced parents. Every message is timestamped, cryptographically hashed, and chained to the record before it so the history cannot be quietly edited or deleted. Read and open times are captured automatically. When a parent hires an attorney, that attorney can review the verified record directly — no screenshots, no reassembly. Parents never pay; the service is free to use for as long as you need it.

A record you can stand behind

Texts get deleted. Screenshots get doctored. Memory gets disputed. In a custody matter, "he said, she said" is a losing position for the parent who is telling the truth.

Liaison.legal removes the argument. Every message is preserved exactly as it was sent, with the time it was sent and the time it was read. The record is the same whether you ever go to court or not — and it is yours from your very first message.

Everything you need to protect yourself

🔗

Tamper-evident message ledger

Every message is cryptographically hashed with SHA-256 and chained to the record before it. The history can't be quietly edited or deleted after the fact.

👁️

Read & open confirmation

Exact timestamps for when each message is delivered and read. "I never saw that" stops being a defense.

🔒

Encrypted & access-controlled

Messages are encrypted in transit and at rest, with strict controls over who can ever see them.

📋

Complete, searchable history

A clean, chronological, verifiable record of every exchange — organized and ready the moment you need it.

📁

Document storage

Keep court orders, parenting plans, and case documents in the same secure place as your communication.

⚖️

Attorney-ready from day one

If you hire a lawyer, they get direct access to the verified record. No nights spent assembling screenshots.

Built for the people who'll read it

Most co-parenting apps stop at storing messages. Liaison.legal is built around what happens next — when your attorney needs to show a court exactly what was agreed, what was asked, and what was ignored.

When an attorney is brought onto a matter, Liaison.legal's AI Forensic Auditor cross-references the communication record against the uploaded court order and surfaces potential deviations — every one traced back to the exact message that supports it. That analysis is built for attorneys, reviewed by attorneys, and never shown to parents. Your job is to keep an honest record. We make that record worth something.

For attorneys and firms →

Free for parents. Not "free trial." Free.

There is no parent payment screen anywhere in Liaison.legal — by design. Documenting your co-parenting communication is free, unconditionally, whether or not you ever hire a lawyer.

Read the Free Promise →

Your record starts with your next message.

Free forever for parents. No credit card. No catch.

Tamper-evident co-parenting communication. Free for parents, forever.

Not a law firm. Does not provide legal advice.

Liaison.legal is a record-keeping tool, not an emergency service. If you or your child are in immediate danger, call 911 or your local emergency number.
